standing_rule: Before testing whether A generates B, write exact independent definitions of A and B, confirm no symbol collision, confirm A is not a primitive relabel, derive from QBL/Orthad first, compare to external targets only after the derivation stands on its own.

deprecated_selector_shorthands.PC_REF: Q∘B=B∘Q in old executable balanced-window selector context only
deprecated_selector_shorthands.PC_HOLD: Q in old executable balanced-window selector context only
deprecated_selector_shorthands.PC_LFT: L in old executable balanced-window selector context only

shadow_law: Scalar terminal readout coefficients stay external; retained orientation-residue vector and cross-orientation coupling may be carried in lift.
